entry.title: Bill 100 (Hawaiʻi County): Passed Second Reading → —
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Appropriates revenues in the State Grants – SS4A-County of Hawaiʻi Smart and Safe Intersection Demonstration Project account ($840,000)

Status: Passed Second Reading → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-12-03

View on the council site

entry.title: Bill 100 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading

Appropriates revenues in the State Grants – SS4A-County of Hawaiʻi Smart and Safe Intersection Demonstration Project account ($840,000)

Latest action: Council: Bill 100 passes second & final reading - 12/03/25

entry.title: New: Bill 100 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-12-03
entry.content:
